review_command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

findings.title: Direct canonical-pattern branch coverage for crg_ invalid bodies
findings.summary: Initial P2-1 was fixed with direct crg_-prefixed invalid-body cases in model tests and RP00 validator, then verified by follow-up Claude review.

findings.title: Blank and non-string rejection coverage at ClaudeReviewGate boundary
findings.summary: Initial P2-2 was fixed with blank, whitespace-only, null, undefined, numeric, and object cases in model tests and RP00 validator, then verified by follow-up Claude review.

P2.title: Negative identifier tests mostly exercise the prefix guard, not the canonical-pattern branch
P2.resolution: Added direct crg_ prefix invalid-body cases for uppercase body, hyphenated body, trailing underscore, prefix-only, slash separator, dot separator, and double underscore in both model tests and the RP00 validator.

P2.title: forbiddenForms includes blank but blank/non-string rejection is not directly tested at the ClaudeReviewGate boundary
P2.resolution: Added blank, whitespace-only, null, undefined, numeric, and object rejection coverage in model tests and the RP00 validator.

P3.title: Registry pre-commits tenantScoped:false ahead of the S03 tenant-scope policy
P3.resolution: Added an explicit registry test asserting ClaudeReviewGate tenantScoped false until S03 formalizes tenant scope.

P3.title: normalizeClaudeReviewGateId only trims and rejects noncanonical case/separators
P3.resolution: No code change; fail-closed behavior matches the declared normalization semantics and HermesGate precedent.

P3.title: Cosmetic prefix message for corrupted-prefix inputs
P3.resolution: No code change; behavior fails closed and message specificity is non-blocking.

followup_review.review_command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json
followup_review.readiness: Ready to promote to production_ready after construction inspection and final validation rerun.

followup_review_reason: P2 fixes changed tests and validator after the initial Claude review; follow-up read-only review completed and verified final state.
